name: Upload Policy
description: Resizes oversized image uploads server-side and rejects videos / PDFs. Applies uniformly to web, mobile, and desktop clients.

settings_schema.header: Resizes large image uploads and rejects video / PDF uploads. Runs inside the server upload pipeline, so every client (web, mobile, desktop) is covered.
settings_schema.footer: PNG and GIF uploads only get converted to JPEG when their longest edge exceeds MaxDimension; small PNG/GIF files pass through untouched so transparency and animation are preserved. Videos and PDFs are always rejected when RejectVideosAndPDFs is on, with the configured message shown to the uploader.

settings.help_text: Master switch for the entire plugin.
Images whose longest edge exceeds this will be resized down. JPEGs get re-encoded; PNGs and GIFs are converted to JPEG only when they exceed this size.
Output JPEG quality. 80 is a good chat-app default.
Block uploads detected as video/* or application/pdf.
Shown to the uploader when a video or PDF is blocked.
settings.default: This file type isn't allowed in this chat. Please convert it to an image, or share a link instead.
